# Learning

**Path:** `trajectory/learning`

Trajectory or sequence recognition using learned temporal, recurrent, or attention-based models.

## Scope

**Include:** sequence transformer; learned scan-sequence descriptor

**Exclude:** single-scan transformer without temporal input
